content.text: Overview and data management for employee.
Manage payment records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage when records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage clear records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage easily records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.
Manage hour records and open the create dialog when new data is needed.

specs.name: CalculateSalaryStatement
specs.description: Calculates gross, deductions, and net salary based on hours and payment frequency (US15, US16).

specs.name: GenerateSalaryStatement
specs.description: This flow handles the creation and finalization of the payroll record.

specs.name: SendNotification
specs.description: Generic flow to send notifications (e.g., status updates, reminders).

specs.name: UpdateMessage
specs.description: Updates the message content for messaging features.
